DROP TABLE [EDW].[SUMM_CALL_LINEAGE]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[SUMM_CALL_LINEAGE]
( 
	[InvocaCallerID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[InvocaCallRecordID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[InvocaCallDate] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[InvocaMediaType] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[InvocaPromoNumberDescription] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[InvocaCallSegmentPath] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[InvocaFinalCampaign] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[InvocaTotalDuration] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[InvocaTotalConnectedDuration] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[InvocaTotalIVRDuration] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[InvocaCity] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[InvocaRegion] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[InvocaPhoneType] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[InvocaSignalNames] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Five9ANI] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Five9CallID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Five9CallDate] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Five9Campaign] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Five9CallType] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Five9Disposition] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Five9CallTime] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LPPhone] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LPCallID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LPCallTypeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LPCallResultID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LPCallDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[LPLeadID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LPCustomerID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LPEntryDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[LPLeadSourceID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LPLeadSubSourceID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LPLeadSubSource] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LPGrossSalesAmount] [decimal](19,4)  NULL,
	[LPDispositionID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LPDisposition] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LPDivision] [nvarchar](100)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [InvocaCallerID] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
